source_pr.title: expression: migrate tests to testify
source_pr.body:
... also use a thread safe rng for stable test

This closes #29132 .
This closes #29134 .
This closes #29142 .

This closes #29283 . Move `TestCIWeightString` to serial test.

This closes #29164 . Replace `rand.Source` with `lockedSource`.

Signed-off-by: tison <wander4096@gmail.com>

### Release note

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: - c.Skip("Skip this unstable test temporarily and bring it back before 2021-07-26") | return &defaultRandGen{rand.New(&lockedSource{src:rand.NewSource(int64(rand.Uint64()))})} (expression/bench_test.go)
failure_signature: - c.Skip("Skip this unstable test temporarily and bring it back before 2021-07-26") | return &defaultRandGen{rand.New(&lockedSource{src:rand.NewSource(int64(rand.Uint64()))})} (expression/bench_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The instability came from tests exercising shared randomness and test infrastructure in a way that was not safe under concurrent execution. This PR stabilizes the suite by making the RNG thread-safe (wrapping `rand.Source` with a mutex via `lockedSource`), moving sensitive tests to a serial suite where needed, and migrating legacy gocheck-style tests to testify/Go `testing.T`.
fix_pattern: Use a thread-safe RNG (locked `rand.Source`), run race-prone tests serially, and migrate gocheck tests to testify for better stability.

evidence: evidence: - c.Skip("Skip this unstable test temporarily and bring it back before 2021-07-26") | return &defaultRandGen{rand.New(&lockedSource{src:rand.NewSource(int64(rand.Uint64()))})} (expression/bench_test.go)
